author: Brot & Games
message:
Expand test coverage to 83% with SimpleCov

- Add SimpleCov with parallel-test support (parallelize_setup/teardown)
  and ignore generated coverage/ output in .gitignore
- Add scheduler/callback tests to CheckTest: after_create, after_destroy,
  create_job, unschedule_job, create_tls_job, unschedule_tls_job, and all
  four branches of update_routine (activate, deactivate, cron/url change,
  unrelated change)
- Rewrite WebhookParserTest: clean up env vars after each test, cover
  .matches/.names/.webhooks including missing-payload defaults
- Expand ReplaceRendererTest: cover all 7 placeholders, nil template,
  missing keys, and Base#render raising NotImplementedError
- Add Notifications::Base#notify NotImplementedError test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Brot & Games
message: Fix timing attack on Basic Auth

author: Brot & Games
message: Change log entry when SECRET_KEY_BASE not set

author: Brot & Games
message:
Add comprehensive test suite and fix SMTP TLS configuration conflict

- Fix ArgumentError when both SMTP_SSL and SMTP_ENABLE_STARTTLS_AUTO are
  set: build smtp_settings conditionally so only one TLS key is included,
  as the mail gem treats them as mutually exclusive
- Add default_options to test environment so mailer delivery tests have
  a valid from/to address without requiring real SMTP config
- Expand controller tests: JSON formats, validation failures, dashboard,
  admin, job, and jobs_recreate actions; stub scheduler callbacks in setup
- Add model tests for Check (validations, scopes, percentage helpers) and
  StatusChange (association, validity)
- Add ChecksHelperTest covering all five helper methods
- Add CheckMailerTest covering subject and delivery for both mail types
- Add MailNotificationTest covering notify delegation for status change
  and TLS expiry notifications
- Update fixtures with realistic status values and an inactive check
  fixture to support scope tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
